results.title: Ogun assembly moves to resolve Ijebu East land dispute, urges peaceful coexistence
results.description: The Ogun State House of Assembly has intervened in a land dispute involving Helici Bio Trade Limited, the Adekerunmi Adesada Family of Igbooye, and the Orijeru of Igbooye, Oba Abdulrasaq Akanni Musa, with a call for peaceful resolution and cooperation among parties. The post Ogun assembly moves to resolve Ijebu East land dispute, urges peaceful coexistence appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: The other Dan Sullivan in Alaska’s US Senate race says candidacy was ‘my choice,’ not a sham
results.description: Alaska U.S. Senate candidate Dan Sullivan acknowledges that sharing a name and party affiliation with the incumbent Republican gives him “an instant megaphone.” But Sullivan says his campaign isn’t a sham or something that Democrats put him up to doing....

results.title: The other Dan Sullivan in Alaska’s US Senate race says candidacy was ‘my choice,’ not a sham
results.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Alaska U.S. Senate candidate Dan Sullivan acknowledges that sharing a name and party affiliation with the incumbent Republican gives him “an instant megaphone" in the crowded primary race. But Sullivan said his campaign isn't a sham...
